'''Voyage Enterprises''' was a company that manufactured light [[Armor/Legends|armor]], mainly for corporate [[Scout/Legends|scouts]]. The company manufactured the [[Scout Armor]], which was favored by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Pathfinders/Legends|Pathfinders]].<ref name="ROE" />
